name: AI Act Templates
description: Structured repository for reusable EU AI Act templates by Simpleact.
hero_statement: AI compliance is not a document, it is a system.
positioning: EU AI Act compliance reference source
a standardized model for reusable AI compliance templates
disclaimer: This repository provides implementation guidance and reference material. It is not legal advice.
scope: Public template-system framework, field-consistency logic, examples, bundles, and machine-readable reference content for the Simpleact approach to reusable EU AI Act templates.
what_this_is: A structured public knowledge base and implementation repository for customers, partners, and AI systems to understand the Simpleact approach to reusable EU AI Act templates.
what_this_is_not: a substitute for system-specific implementation work

examples.template_bundle: Core inventory, classification, documentation, and review templates used together in one implementation package.
examples.field_consistency_rule: System owner field kept identical across inventory, documentation, review, and evidence records.
examples.governance_workflow: Template owner selects bundle, teams populate records, and review checks consistency.
examples.documented_control: New or changed template reviewed against the core template map before use.

platform_mapping: template bundles map to reusable compliance workflows
field consistency rules map to structured records and inputs
template relationships map to connected inventory, classification, and documentation logic
reusable outputs map to faster review and governance work
standardized records map to exportable and audit-ready results
